stories.title: 只看一眼的客人
stories.source_range: inspired by dismissive buyers and public judgment scenes

sentences.chinese: 市场里有一种客人，杂草一直不太喜欢。
sentences.english_helper: There is one kind of customer in the market that Weed has never liked much.

sentences.chinese: 那种人来得快，走得也快。
sentences.english_helper: That kind of person comes quickly and leaves quickly.

sentences.chinese: 只看一眼，就先开口。
sentences.english_helper: After one glance, they speak first.

sentences.chinese: 那天，他就遇到了这样一个人。
sentences.english_helper: That day, he meets exactly such a person.

sentences.chinese: 那个人走过来，随手拿起一个小雕刻。
sentences.english_helper: The person walks over and casually picks up a small carving.

sentences.chinese: 只看了一眼，就说：“这个不行。”
sentences.english_helper: After one glance, the person says, 'This one won't do.'

sentences.chinese: 又看了第二件，也说：“这个也不行。”
sentences.english_helper: Then looks at a second one and says, 'This one won't do either.'

sentences.chinese: 杂草听见这些话，心里马上被刺了一下。
sentences.english_helper: Hearing those words, Weed feels an immediate sting inside.

sentences.chinese: 因为那个人根本没有认真看。
sentences.english_helper: Because that person did not look seriously at all.

sentences.chinese: 可是评价却说得很快。
sentences.english_helper: Yet the judgment comes very quickly.

sentences.chinese: 杂草差一点就想回话。
sentences.english_helper: Weed almost wants to answer back.

sentences.chinese: 他甚至已经想到好几句难听的话。
sentences.english_helper: He has even already thought of several harsh lines.

sentences.chinese: 可是话到嘴边，他又停住了。
sentences.english_helper: But when the words reach his lips, he stops again.

sentences.chinese: 因为他忽然想到，自己如果现在回过去，今天一整天都会坏掉。
sentences.english_helper: Because he suddenly thinks that if he fires back now, the whole day will be ruined.

sentences.chinese: 而那个人说完就会走。
sentences.english_helper: And that person will leave right after speaking.

sentences.chinese: 最后留下来生气的人，还是自己。
sentences.english_helper: The one left behind feeling angry will still be himself.

sentences.chinese: 所以杂草没有争。
sentences.english_helper: So Weed does not argue.

sentences.chinese: 那个人果然很快就走了。
sentences.english_helper: Sure enough, the person leaves very quickly.

sentences.chinese: 杂草一个人站在原地，心里还是很乱。
sentences.english_helper: Weed stands there alone, and his mind is still very unsettled.

sentences.chinese: 他低头看着自己的作品。
sentences.english_helper: He lowers his head and looks at his own work.

sentences.chinese: 然后慢慢问自己一个问题。
sentences.english_helper: Then he slowly asks himself one question.

sentences.chinese: 那个人真的看懂了吗？
sentences.english_helper: Did that person really understand what he saw?

sentences.chinese: 答案当然是没有。
sentences.english_helper: The answer is of course no.

sentences.chinese: 想到这里，杂草的气慢慢下去了一点。
sentences.english_helper: Thinking this, Weed's anger slowly goes down a little.

sentences.chinese: 因为他终于知道，不是每一句话都值得放进心里。
sentences.english_helper: Because he finally knows that not every sentence is worth placing in his heart.

sentences.chinese: 后来，他把那件作品拿近一点，又认真看了一次。
sentences.english_helper: Later, he brings the piece closer and looks at it seriously once more.

sentences.chinese: 他发现上面当然还有问题。
sentences.english_helper: He finds that of course there are still problems in it.

sentences.chinese: 可是那些问题，不是刚才那个人随手说出来的那些。
sentences.english_helper: But those are not the same problems that person casually spoke about.

sentences.chinese: 杂草这一次没有再想那个人。
sentences.english_helper: This time, Weed stops thinking about that person.

sentences.chinese: 他只开始想下一件。
sentences.english_helper: He only starts thinking about the next piece.

sentences.chinese: 他终于明白，想走得稳一点，就要把心留给真正专心看的人。
sentences.english_helper: He finally understands that if he wants to walk more steadily, he has to keep his heart for the people who truly look with focus.

stories.title: 学会等的人
stories.source_range: inspired by material preparation and waiting-as-work scenes

sentences.chinese: 杂草最近开始觉得，做东西最烦的时候，不一定是下刀。
sentences.english_helper: Lately, Weed begins to feel that the most frustrating part of making things is not always the carving itself.

sentences.chinese: 有时候，最烦的是等。
sentences.english_helper: Sometimes, the most frustrating part is waiting.

sentences.chinese: 有的木头不能马上用。
sentences.english_helper: Some wood cannot be used right away.

sentences.chinese: 有的地方也不能马上改。
sentences.english_helper: Some parts also cannot be fixed immediately.

sentences.chinese: 要先等一等。
sentences.english_helper: You have to wait a little first.

sentences.chinese: 杂草以前最不喜欢这个步骤。
sentences.english_helper: Weed used to dislike this step the most.

sentences.chinese: 因为在他心里，等就是什么都没做。
sentences.english_helper: Because in his mind, waiting meant doing nothing.

sentences.chinese: 什么都没做，就让人着急。
sentences.english_helper: Doing nothing makes a person anxious.

sentences.chinese: 那天，他又遇到了要等的情况。
sentences.english_helper: That day, he runs into another situation where he has to wait.

sentences.chinese: 一块木头还没有完全干。
sentences.english_helper: A piece of wood is not fully dry yet.

sentences.chinese: 如果现在下刀，后面一定会出问题。
sentences.english_helper: If he cuts it now, there will definitely be problems later.

sentences.chinese: 杂草当然知道这个。
sentences.english_helper: Of course Weed knows this.

sentences.chinese: 可是知道，不等于心里愿意。
sentences.english_helper: But knowing is not the same as being willing inside.

sentences.chinese: 他坐在那里，看着那块木头，越看越急。
sentences.english_helper: He sits there looking at the wood, and the more he looks, the more anxious he gets.

sentences.chinese: 他差一点就想先做下去再说。
sentences.english_helper: He almost wants to keep working on it first and deal with the rest later.

sentences.chinese: 可是这一次，他没有。
sentences.english_helper: But this time, he does not.

sentences.chinese: 他忽然想到，也许等本来就是工作的一部分。
sentences.english_helper: He suddenly thinks that maybe waiting is simply part of the work.

sentences.chinese: 如果自己提前知道要等，为什么不先去做别的步骤？
sentences.english_helper: If he knows in advance that he has to wait, why not do a different step first?

sentences.chinese: 想到这里，杂草站了起来。
sentences.english_helper: Thinking this, Weed stands up.

sentences.chinese: 他把旁边还没整理好的工具先整理好。
sentences.english_helper: He first organizes the tools nearby that had not yet been put in order.

sentences.chinese: 又把下一块木头也先看了一遍。
sentences.english_helper: Then he looks over the next piece of wood in advance too.

sentences.chinese: 后来还记下了几个想改的地方。
sentences.english_helper: Later, he also writes down a few places he wants to adjust.

sentences.chinese: 等他再回来的时候，那块木头已经差不多好了。
sentences.english_helper: By the time he returns, the piece of wood is almost ready.

sentences.chinese: 杂草低头看着它，心里有一点奇怪。
sentences.english_helper: Weed looks down at it and feels a little strange inside.

sentences.chinese: 因为刚才那段时间，他明明没有下刀。
sentences.english_helper: Because during that stretch of time, he clearly did not carve at all.

sentences.chinese: 可是事情还是往前走了。
sentences.english_helper: But things still moved forward.

sentences.chinese: 那一刻他才明白，等不是空白。
sentences.english_helper: At that moment he understands that waiting is not blank time.

sentences.chinese: 等也是一种做事的方法。
sentences.english_helper: Waiting is also a way of working.

sentences.chinese: 从那以后，杂草还是不喜欢等。
sentences.english_helper: After that, Weed still does not like waiting.

sentences.chinese: 可是他已经学会，怎么让等也变成前进。
sentences.english_helper: But he has learned how to make waiting become progress too.
